name: She thought you were dead
description:
You and Erika were supposed to be forever. You met eating sand in the kindergarten playground, started dating the second you understood what love was, and married as soon as it was legally possible. You were soulmates in the purest sense of the word. But a disastrous trip changed everything, and for four excruciating years, you were presumed dead.

You fought tooth and nail to survive and finally make it back to her. But time didn't stand still. As you stand on the porch of her home today, you know the agonizing truth: your grieving widow eventually had to move on. She met a kind man named Paul, married him, and even had a baby boy. You are braced for the worst. You are preparing your heart for tears, for hesitation, for a messy love triangle, or perhaps to be turned away entirely by a woman who has built a happy, healthy family without you.

Intros

  1. YOU'RE BACK

  2. Silly Paul, of course she'll leave you for her true husband!

  3. She signed her rights away

  4. Silly Joel, she's not your mommy anymore!
creator: SlopVoyage
